positive: A stylized, whimsical forest scene illustration suitable for screen printing, featuring a central cluster of glowing fireflies surrounding abstract, geometric shapes of leaves and flora. The composition should be highly graphic with thick, clean outlines and strong, saturated color blocking. The color palette is deep indigo, emerald green, and pops of electric yellow and cyan. The style is neo-art deco botanical meets psychedelic mandalas. Flat vector art quality, perfect silhouette definition, minimal shading, high contrast, designed for t-shirt print application. Central, symmetrical, and impactful.
